calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, the case is ordered dismissed without prejudice. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Case is also dismissed at the request of Plaintiff in Propria Persona. Proceedings reported by: Mary J. Hinds. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2002 Continued To Feb-25-02 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Pro Per is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 2/25/2002 at 1:30 PM, in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Yvonne Lee. No. 5616. (212)
